NAVAREA XIX 72/25
 1. ANDOEYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS FROM 30 JUNE TO 14 JULY DAILY FROM 0530-1145 UTC. MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS :

 DANGER AREA MXD-2 OUTER
 A. 69-44.00N 015-36.00E
 B. 70-00.00N 015-17.00E
 C. 69-55.00N 014-37.00E
 D. 69-40.00N 014-58.00E
 E. 69-44.00N 015-36.00E

 DANGER AREA MXD-INNER
 A. 69-18.00N 016-05.00E
 B. 69-24.00N 015-53.00E
 C. 69-23.00N 015-50.00E
 D. 69-17.00N 015-59.00E


 ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON. TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 76 14 44 28 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16. E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO

 SEE NOTICES TO MARINERS 11/2025 WWW.KARTVERKET.NO/EN/AT-SEA/EFS AND WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO

 2. CANCEL THIS WARNING 141145 UTC JULY 2025.
